allow: Bash(sqlite3 data/launchpad.db "SELECT t.id, t.title, t.estimated_hours, t.status, t.due_date, t.category FROM tasks t WHERE t.due_date = ''2026-03-31'' OR \(t.status = ''pending'' AND t.due_date <= ''2026-03-31''\) ORDER BY t.due_date, t.id LIMIT 20;")
Bash(sqlite3 /Users/aidin/Documents/Websites/claude-code/my-brain/data/launchpad.db "SELECT id, title, description, notes FROM tasks WHERE week_number = 1 AND id IN \(1,2,3\);")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/aidin/Documents/Websites/claude-code/my-brain/data/launchpad.db "UPDATE tasks SET status = ''done'', hours_actual = 0.0, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, notes = ''Launchpad DB handles all tracking — no spreadsheet needed.'' WHERE id = 1;")
